Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S Motion To Transfer Venue.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to transfer venue is granted; plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

A proposed order is submitted for the Court's review and signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
